primary.description: Japanese JEPX Day-Ahead Spot History in half hour resolution from 2011-01-01 includes bids volumes prices

JEPX Day-Ahead bidding curve chart points. Contains one row per plotted Buy or Sell curve point for each delivery date, half-hour period ID, and split area group. Each delivery day has 48 half-hour periods.
primary.timezone: JST for delivery periods; downloader scheduling uses AEST
